data.title: NorthSky Supply launches ecommerce platform for MRO Supplies
data.description: The digital-first B2B distributor based in The Woodlands, Texas, has launched a platform to provide maintenance, repair, and operations (MRO) products to U.S. businesses.

data.title: Trane Technologies to acquire AI HVAC firm BrainBox AI
data.description: BrainBox AI has developed an AI-powered platform designed to optimize energy usage in commercial buildings. The technology predicts energy needs, automates HVAC operations.

data.title: Cart.com acquires OceanX to expand logistics and fulfillment capabilities
data.description: The deal adds approximately 200 OceanX employees to Cart.com’s team and two new facilities, including a west coast hub in Southern California and a third center near Columbus, Ohio. Cart.com now operates 17 omnichannel fulfillment centers spanning 10 million square feet and employs over 1,600 employees.

data.title: Consumers prepare for last-minute shopping on Super Saturday
data.description: National Retail Federation (NRF) data shows that 69.5 million consumers plan to shop both in-store and online on Super Saturday this year.

data.title: Best Buy Canada opens up its retail media advertising to third-party brands
data.description: Through a partnership with the vendor Rokt, products that aren't sold at Best Buy Canada will gain access to its retail media network and shoppers.
